Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}This is Tartarus—the labyrinth that reveals itself during the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Once the Dark Hour passes, everything will return to normal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}This is the "nest" you were talking about!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}But, why!? Why'd our school turn into a giant tower!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}If we don't know, we'll just have to find out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Mitsuru and I have only gone in to take a peek; this'll be our first time exploring it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}There's gotta be something in there. Hopefully some sort of clue about the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Akihiko. I respect your enthusiasm, but you won't be exploring it today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I know... You don't have to keep reminding me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In any case, we decide to enter the tower...[n]{f 1 1}
